LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DONATUS MCCOY'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT - GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DONATUS MCCOY's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
